content:
OfficerID: kozmaj, Narrative
Sir:
On 1-04-18 while assigned to Z/C 5D34 I received a R/B to respond over to 844 E 200 apt #3 in C/Wcaller(Lashanna Clack) coming home and found races/raciall words written on her mailbox. Upon my arrival on scene I conferred with caller(Lashanna Clack) and Kristian Mixon.
Lashanna Clack stated on 1-3-18 at approximately 815 hrs/(2015 hrs) she came home and noticed someone had written "Niggers", " URDEAD" on her mailbox(#3) in some white material. Ms. Clack then stated she noticed someone had also written on the next mailbox(#6) "MOMMY" but skipped the following mailbox(Cloud/Fawcett), but wrote on the next mailbox(#5) "NIG" with the same white material. Lashanna Clack further stated it seemed odd that they would skip the one mailbox. Ms. Clack stated she then went over to her friends(Kristian Mixon) apt #5 to see, if see saw anything or knows anything, and then notified CPD. Ms. Mixon also stated she was very concerned that this incident was directed at her, but when asked if she had any issues with anyone she stated "no", but was concerned for her and her childrens safety.
Kristian Mixon (mailbox #5) stated she asked her boyfriend if he had seen anything when he came in at 400 pm (1600) and he stated "no" to her, and that nothing was written on the mailboxes at that time. Ms. Mixon then stated she came down with Ms. Clack and noticed what was written on the mailboxes and stated it looked as if children had done this, but she didn't see anyone.
Eugene Cloud (apt #4) stated he did not see who did this to the mailboxes, but he was a victim of this same type of incident, earlier last year. Mr. Cloud then stated on 1-3-18 at approximately 9 or 10 amwhen he came in to the apt building he saw a homeless female flee (white or puerto rican/female/brown stringy hair/30's/ slender/5'4) from under the stairs and couldn't locate her with the help of maintenance, but doesn't know if she had anything to do with this incident.
FIR: No witnesses or suspects at the time of this report. Conferred with 5S33 Sgt. Lally SIU requested for photo's and possible prints. Title to read Vandalism/Hate Incident WCS Ms Clack highly intoxicated Respectfully request Det. Bureau to follow up No Response at apt 6 door
You created this PDF from an application that is not licensed to print to novaPDF printer (http://www.novapdf.com)
